snapshot.content: Cycle 256: Created the minimal CLAUDE.md (CLAUDE.md.minimal) for the forkable template goal (task 4 of 6). The file is 141 lines — a 67% reduction from the full 430-line template — and includes only the core 4-phase cycle (orient, decide, execute, record), goal decomposition, and rules. Stripped reflection, email, mem0, model delegation, user comments, and learning hygiene. Next task: update the root README template section with clearer fork instructions and link to the showcase page.
snapshot.current_focus: Update root README template section (task 5 of forkable template goal).
